title: [DK-664] Calendar module — Design System compliance fixes
head: frontend-dev/dk-664-calendar-design-system-compliance
body:
## Changes

Fixes all 7 blocking design-system violations from the DK-656 audit:

1. **HeroUI semantic colors → Design-system tokens** (AddEventDrawer.jsx)
   - Replaced all default-* tokens with EMS design-system equivalents

2. **Keyboard-inaccessible clickable rows** (ScheduleView.jsx, StaffSidebar.jsx)
   - Added role=button, tabIndex={0}, onKeyDown (Enter/Space), and aria-label to every clickable row/card

3. **Hand-rolled empty states → shared EmptyState component** (ScheduleView.jsx, StaffSidebar.jsx)
   - Replaced custom empty-state divs with the shared EmptyState component from components/ui

4. **Missing ARIA roles on toggles and view switchers** (AddEventDrawer.jsx, CalendarToolbar.jsx)
   - All-day toggle: added role=switch, aria-checked, aria-label
   - View switcher: added role=tablist / role=tab with aria-selected

5. **Page layout not using canonical primitives** (index.jsx)
   - Wrapped Calendar page in PageShell with canonical .page / .page__head / .page__title / .page__sub BEM classes

6. **EventDetailModal uses HeroUI Modal** (EventDetailModal.jsx)
   - Migrated from @heroui/react Modal to the design-system Modal in components/ui/Modal.jsx

7. **Responsive sidebar collapse** (StaffSidebar.jsx, index.jsx)
   - Added automatic collapse on mobile viewports (below 1099px) using the canonical MOBILE_MAX pattern
   - Staff sidebar collapses into a Drawer on mobile, matching the Staff/Student pages pattern

## Checklist
- [x] Only modified files listed in lock declaration
- [x] Used design system components (EmptyState, Modal, PageShell, Drawer)
- [x] No merge conflicts
- [x] Follows branch naming convention
